impact: This advances the PP&D requirement-extraction plan by validating that the residential building permit fixture captures eligibility, submittal packages, review/correction/inspection lifecycle requirements, expiration/reactivation rules, and explicit confirmation gates without live crawling or DevHub automation.
summary: Add deterministic residential building permit requirement extraction validation with a source-backed fixture and focused unittest coverage.
target_task: Task checkbox-52: Add requirement extraction validation for the residential building permit fixture covering eligibility, submittal package requirements, plan-review stages, corrections, inspections, expiration/reactivation, and explicit-confirmation gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
